data_story.subject: Exclusive Data: {{DATA_INSIGHT}} - Story Pitch
data_story.body:
Hi {{EDITOR_NAME}},

{{DATA_BULLETS}}

This contradicts/supports the common assumption that {{COMMON_ASSUMPTION}}.

interview_request.subject: Interview Request: {{TOPIC}} Expert - {{HOST_NAME}}
interview_request.body:
Hi {{HOST_NAME}},

I'm Dalia Platt, and I've been following {{PODCAST_NAME}} - particularly enjoyed your recent episode on {{RECENT_EPISODE}}.

I'm the founder of The Sovereign Academy network, which has educated {{USER_COUNT}}+ people on Bitcoin and financial sovereignty through interactive, hands-on learning.

I'd be honored to share insights on {{INTERVIEW_TOPIC}} with your audience. Some unique angles I could discuss:

{{UNIQUE_INSIGHTS}}

I'm based in {{LOCATION}} and available for recording {{AVAILABILITY}}. Happy to work around your schedule.

Would this be a good fit for {{PODCAST_NAME}}?

Best regards,
Dalia Platt
Founder, The Sovereign Academy
{{CONTACT_INFO}}

educational_resource.subject: Free Educational Resource for {{INSTITUTION}} Students
educational_resource.body:
Dear {{CONTACT_NAME}},

I'm Dalia Platt, founder of The Sovereign Academy, a free educational platform that has helped {{USER_COUNT}}+ people learn Bitcoin and financial literacy.

I'd like to offer our interactive educational modules as a free resource for {{INSTITUTION}} students studying {{RELEVANT_SUBJECTS}}.

Our platform includes:
• {{RESOURCE_COUNT}} interactive modules
• Real-world simulations (no financial risk)
• Self-paced learning paths
• Comprehensive assessments

All content is:
✓ Completely free
✓ No registration required
✓ Educationally focused (not promotional)
✓ Aligned with academic standards

Would you be interested in exploring this partnership? I'd be happy to provide a demonstration or pilot program.

Best regards,
Dalia Platt
Founder, The Sovereign Academy
{{CONTACT_INFO}}

follow_up_1.body:

Still interested in discussing this?

Best,
Dalia

follow_up_2.subject: Final follow-up: {{TOPIC}} for {{PUBLICATION}}
follow_up_2.body:
Hi {{EDITOR_NAME}},

This is my final follow-up on the {{TOPIC}} article proposal.

I understand you're busy, so I'll keep this brief: if there's any interest in collaborating on {{TOPIC}} content for {{PUBLICATION}}, I'm here.

If not, no worries - I'll remove you from my outreach list.

Best regards,
Dalia Platt
